name: Linear Gold Corp.
description: Linear Gold Corp. was a publicly-traded mineral exploration and development company primarily focused on the acquisition, exploration, and advancement of gold properties located in Central America. The company possessed an experienced management team with expertise in mineral exploration, equity financing, and public company administration. In 2010, Linear Gold Corp. completed a merger with Apollo Gold Corporation to form a new entity known as Brigus Gold Corp., a strategic transaction valued at approximately $102 million, which effectively concluded the company's independent operations as a standalone exploration firm.
